text:
The Copilot+ PC family just got bigger. Say hello to the 13-inch Surface Laptop and the 12-inch Surface Pro. All-day battery life, all-new colorways, and ultimate portability. 

Pre-order at the link in bio. #NewSurfacePCs #MicrosoftSurface #CopilotPCs #SurfaceLaptop #SurfacePro
📢 tech drop alert 📢 The next generation of Surface is here. The newest Copilot+ PCs from Microsoft Surface are available for pre-order starting now at link in bio!  #NewSurfacePCs

Choosing a college starts with where you want to go in life. @olandria talks with an aspiring nurse about finding the right path, then asks Copilot to help narrow down HBCUs with strong nursing programs.
#SurfacePartner Take the Surface Laptop 13.8 inch for a drive! It's portability and battery life make it the best laptop on the go @surface

#SurfacePartner Best of both worlds, hello! The power of a laptop with the ease, flexibility, and portability of a tablet. I’m specifically enjoying the ability to work however I want when it comes to the 700 mood boards I have to put together every week. How are you feeling about the @surface laptop?
#SurfacePartner My tech load is much lighter this year now that I’m moving around with the @surface Laptop 13 inch. Even the color is almost like it was made specifically for me. 😌
#SurfacePartner turn the @surface Laptop 13.8 inch into your ultimate study partner! link in bio ✏️

Your laptop should not weigh more than your groceries lol. Glad this one from @surface maintains its light weight status. What’s one feature you need in a laptop to make your workflow easier? Let me know in the comments below. #SurfacePartner
New year. New ideas. Same Surface. Here’s to everything you’ll create in the year ahead. ✨
Giving women confidence will always be the why. From hair to community, I love having tools that keep up with my brain & help my ideas come to life. Try Copilot in @microsoft365 #Microsoft365Partner
